form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (30.61) in a Grade 2/3/4, finishing a 2.5 lengths fourth. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and two places from eight starts. Looks suited and should go close.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Out of the placings last time but the run prior he clocked a brilliant 29.74 over 520m finishing second at Wentworth Park. Hard to top on the time from two back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Out of the placings last time but the run prior he clocked a brilliant 29.74 over 520m finishing second at Wentworth Park. Hard to top on the time from two back.

form.formComment: In hot form winning his last three on end, the latest pinging the lids with a fast early split and clocking 29.32 over 512m at Mt Gambier. In hot form and can take this out.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and contacted running rail first turn.

form.formComment: Placed last time (30.54) at Murray Bridge in a Grade 5/6, finishing third and beaten one length. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and three places from eight starts. Looks a place chance at best.

form.formComment: Finished seventh last start at this track but prior to that had been racing consistently. Tough draw to overcome and looks tested this line up.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 530m. Has claims if at her best.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Mt Gambier over 512m. Last start finished 2nd over 512m at Mt Gambier beaten 1.3 lengths (29.41) behind Gunning Bandit in a OPEN on April 5. Scored two on the trot prior to last start. Can return to winning form.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at The Meadows to win by 2.5 lengths in 29.92, beating Paw Winkworth. Last start finished 4th in a Mix 3/4 on April 11 over 525m at The Meadows behind Aston Summit beaten 5 lengths (30.42). Prepared to risk this time.

form.formComment: At the last start finished 6th in a Grade 4/5 on March 20 over 460m at Geelong behind Baby Beets beaten 7 lengths (26.33). Well placed and among the chances here.
